metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_2247
metadata.comment:
Rationale: PTPRF was enriched in postsynaptic density fractions.

15/01/2018 Pim
- Supplementary Fig. 1: "The percentage of LAR clusters that colocalized with PSD-95 clusters was 54.1 ± 4.8% (DIV21) and 21.2 ± 2.4% (DIV7); the percentage that colocalized with bassoon was 52.8 ± 4.3%" ... "The immunocytochemical data and biochemical findings are consistent with LAR-RPTP being enriched at excitatory synapses but more widely distributed in neurons than PSD-95."
- Based on the known transmembrane topology of the protein, the "integral component of ... membrane" term was chosen.. Experimental description: Figure legend
Figure 1: Expression pattern and fractionation of LAR-RPTP proteins in rat brain.
